chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-460 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA No.2460 of 2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on Misc. No.16466 of 2025. 19.08.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. K.A. Wasvani, AAG Sindh. Intervener Maqsood Akber is present. After arguing the matter at some length the parties have agreed that in view of the letter dated 01.01.2025 issued by Registrar Cooperative Societies, Sindh (available at page 149 as annexure ‘D’) an enquiry is to be conducted by the respondent No.3/Registrar Cooperative Societies Sindh in accordance with law, the byelaws and relevant rules and seek disposal of this petition in the same terms. Accordingly, by consent of the parties, the petition is disposed of in view of the said letter dated 01.01.2025 issued by the respondent No.3. The respondent No.3 is directed to conduct an inquiry in accordance with law, byelaws and the rules after providing proper opportunity of hearing to the parties concerned. JUDGE JUDGE Farooq PS/
